name: advance_opportunity
description: Move a candidate opportunity to the next stage in the hiring pipeline. For example, advance from 'Phone Screen' to 'On-site Interview'. Optionally specify an exact target stage.

parameters.name: opportunity_id
parameters.description: The ID of the opportunity to advance.

parameters.name: stage
parameters.description: The target stage ID to move the opportunity to. If omitted, moves to the next stage in order.
